body:
Add a compat entry for TD 0.14
Bump SciMLBase compats. Previous compat was [2.11, 3.0) New compat is [2.110, 2.113). This is done because the Downgrade ci job does not support ranges, and 2.113 and 2.114 cause an error related to dual numbers

fixes

Merge params with default bucket params

<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->

In the Content, I have included

title: Bump Deps; Update Manifests
